title: Archived: Subscribe for updates - Canada's food guide - Canada.ca
content:
## Archived: Subscribe for updates - Canada's food guide
Health Canada is no longer producing the newsletter. You can continue to access Canada's food guide and the past 12 months of issues at: www.Canada.ca/FoodGuide .
To receive healthy eating tips and updates about the Canada’s food guide, enter your e-mail address below and  click on the "Subscribe" button.
Required fields are marked with an asterisk ( * ).

## Cancelling your subscription
If you are already a subscriber and wish to cancel, enter your email address below and click on the " Unsubscribe " button.
Required fields are marked with an asterisk ( * ).
The personal information you provide to Health Canada is collected by the Food and Nutrition Directorate. This information is collected under the authority of Department of Health Act and handled in accordance with the Privacy Act . The Act sets rules on government institutions' collection, use, disclosure, and retention of personal information. It provides individuals with:
- The right to access your personal information under the control of the Food and Nutrition Directorate;
- The right to request a correction and/or notation to your personal information; and
- The right to complain to the Privacy Commissioner of Canada if you feel your personal information has been handled improperly.
More information about the information collected by the Government of Canada is available on Info Source . Refer to the Public Communications personal information bank (PIB) PSU 914.
